jobs.location: Western Cape > Cape Town: Southern Suburbs
jobs.summary: Step into a high‑impact role where your passion for clean, reliable data truly matters. As a Data Analyst, you’ll be the engine behind flawless data flows, collecting, transforming, and validati
jobs.brief_description: Step into a high‑impact role where your passion for clean, reliable data truly matters. As a Data Analyst, you’ll be the engine behind flawless data flows, collecting, transforming, and validating information that powers critical business decisions. You’ll work hands‑on with SQL, collaborate across teams, and help shape our transition into a modern Azure data environment. If you thrive on problem‑solving, love making messy data make sense, and want to be at the heart of analytics excellence, this role is your perfect next move.
jobs.detail_description: Key Responsibilities: Data Collection and Ingestion: Collect data from multiple internal and external sources (files, APIs, manual submissions, and system exports). Prepare and ingest data into SQL databases using defined processes. Support migration of data workflows to Azure-based services. Data Processing and Transformation: Cleanse, standardise, and transform raw data into structured formats. Map incoming data to existing database schemas and business definitions. Apply business rules and transformation logic consistently. Data Quality and Validation: Validate data for accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness. Identify and resolve data quality issues at source. Maintain validation checks and reconciliation processes. Flag anomalies, trends, or risks in incoming datasets. Database and Data Management: Query, validate, and maintain data in SQL databases. Assist with schema updates, documentation, and data dictionary maintenance. Ensure data integrity across historical and incremental loads. Documentation and Process Improvement: Document data sources, mappings, transformation rules, and validation logic. Continuously improve data ingestion and data quality processes. Support automation initiatives to reduce manual data handling. Stakeholder Support: Work with analysts, reporting teams, and business users to resolve data queries. Provide trusted datasets for reports, dashboards, and decision-making. Job Experience and Skills Required: Degree in Information Systems, Data Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field 1–4 years’ experience in a data, analytics, or systems support role Strong SQL knowledge (queries, joins, validation, and reconciliations) Familiarity with ETL / ELT processes and data pipelines. Apply now!
